description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, featuring a continuous curved surface for skating and bordered by metal safety railings along the top edges. The ramp includes a staircase on one side, providing access to the upper platform, and a central rectangular cutout or opening in the deck. The exterior is decorated with colorful graffiti art and urban motifs, adding a vibrant, street-inspired aesthetic. The structure is constructed primarily from wood planks, with visible grain and a weathered finish, and reinforced with metal elements for safety and durability. The ramp is designed for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities, and is suitable for placement in parks or urban recreational areas.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, graffiti art, and a staircase for access. The structure is robust and urban-themed, designed for skating and BMX activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main curved ramp surface, central opening, and colorful graffiti on the exterior wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full curve of the half-pipe, the staircase, and the upper platform with railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the ramp, additional graffiti, and the staircase structure.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the interior curve of the ramp and the staircase leading to the upper platform.
